course_title: LIVING WELL: WELLNESS PROMOTION FOR GRADUATE STUDENTS
description: Promote students' wellness as they manage graduate school and its demands. Examines health and well-being related to students' time-use patterns; balance among daily activities; daily routines and habits; circadian rhythms; meaningful moments; sleep; and social connections.
